originalTitle: Morgan Stanley Sees Red Bull Price Increase as Positive for Monster Beverage (MNST)
summary: Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 22, 2026, Morgan Stanley said the Beverage Business Insights newsletter confirmed a high-single-digit Red Bull price increase in the U.S. on August 1, which the firm views as positive for sustained category and Monster Beverage Corporation […]
content:
Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In .

Earlier in June, Morgan Stanley analyst Dara Mohsenian raised the firm's price target on Monster Beverage to $103 from $100 and maintained an Overweight rating. Mohsenian sees a potential "margin inflection" for the company in 2027 and said Monster remains a core holding due to its "outsized" revenue growth, international share gains, pricing power, and innovation pipeline.

On June 12, Bernstein initiated coverage of Monster Beverage with a Market Perform rating and $95 price target. Bernstein said Monster has the best international business in the energy drink space and cited Coca-Cola's "unrivaled" distribution network as a factor that should help Monster continue gaining share. Bernstein cited valuation for the neutral rating, seeing only 5% upside from current levels.

Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) develops, markets, sells, and distributes energy drink beverages and concentrates in the United States and internationally.

While we acknowledge the potential of MNST as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the   best short-term AI stock .

chineseTitle: 摩根士丹利认为红牛价格上涨对 Monster Beverage (MNST) 有利
chineseSummary: Monster Beverage Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：MNST）是标普 500 指数中最值得投资的 12 只最赚钱股票之一。 2026 年 6 月 22 日，摩根士丹利表示，《饮料商业洞察》时事通讯证实 8 月 1 日红牛在美国的价格出现高个位数上涨，该公司认为这对可持续类别和 Monster Beverage Corporation 来说是积极的 […]
chineseContent:
Monster Beverage Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：MNST）是标普 500 指数中最值得投资的 12 只最赚钱股票之一。

6 月初，摩根士丹利分析师 Dara Mohsenian 将 Monster Beverage 的目标股价从 100 美元上调至 103 美元，并维持增持评级。 Mohsenian 预计该公司在 2027 年可能会出现“利润率拐点”，并表示 Monster 仍是其核心控股公司，因为其“超额”收入增长、国际份额增长、定价能力和创新渠道。

6 月 12 日，Bernstein 首次对 Monster Beverage 进行了报道，给予市场表现评级和 95 美元的目标价。伯恩斯坦表示，Monster 在能量饮料领域拥有最好的国际业务，并指出可口可乐“无与伦比”的分销网络是帮助 Monster 继续扩大市场份额的一个因素。伯恩斯坦引用了中性评级的估值，认为较当前水平仅上涨 5%。

Monster Beverage Corporation（纳斯达克股票代码：MNST）在美国和国际上开发、营销、销售和分销能量饮料和浓缩液。

虽然我们承认 MNST 作为投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。
